name: flow-09-ticket-purchase-core
description: T99 TicketPurchaseOrchestrator + T100 PaymentProcessor + T101 PaymentVerificationGate — TRANSACTION archetype. Seat TTL hold BEFORE payment capture. Double-booking race closed at T99, not T100.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: seat-hold-before-payment, double-booking-race-at-T99, TTL expiry guard
Retrieve TRANSACTION arch pattern for T99-T101: seat TTL hold before payment, double-booking prevention
Break T99-T101 into: T99 SETNX seat hold (TTL) → T100 capture payment → T101 verify payment → confirm seat
Generate ticket-purchase-orchestrator.service.ts — seat TTL hold BEFORE payment capture. Double-booking race closed at T99.
Named check validation: seat_hold_before_payment, double_booking_race_closed_at_t99, ttl_expiry_guard
Score generated code 0-100 against T99-T101 iron rules: seat hold ordering, TTL guard, payment verification
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
